name: Cissus
summary: It is best framed conservatively because evidence is mixed and product positioning often outruns the data.
description: It is best framed conservatively because evidence is mixed and product positioning often outruns the data.
safetyNotes: May influence glucose or metabolic markers; monitor with antidiabetic medications and avoid pregnancy/breastfeeding use unless clinician-supervised.
interactions: caution with anticoagulants if blended products include additional actives.

sources.title: A review and evaluation of the efficacy and safety of Cissus quadrangularis extracts
Review of the Phytochemistry and Biological Activity of Cissus incisa Leaves

dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Stem extracts/powders and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Stem extracts/powders and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
